## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. For non-trivial changes, please open an issue first. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior or the on-disk format)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build --workspace` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` shows no new warnings in code I touched
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Golden-parity / round-trip tests still pass (or regenerated fixtures with justification)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Comments and identifiers are in English
- [ ] No new mandatory dependency added to `cortiq-core` / `cortiq-engine`

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, platforms (Linux/macOS), CPU and/or GPU. -->
